　　林言五灵根废材，意外获得一尊【黑色小鼎】，一脚踏进修仙界。
　　小鼎空间灵草生长速度百倍，清水转化成灵水，我的修炼资源无上限。
　　林言开始，种仙草，养灵兽，炼丹药，斩妖魔，五十年金丹，一百年元婴，五灵根资质堪比天灵根。
　　本以为是普普通通的修仙，结果发现这修仙界越修越不对劲。
　　什么！你是穿越者？
　　什么！你是气运之子？
　　仙人转世什么鬼？
　　什么我的分身也是穿越者！！！我变成了随身老爷爷……
　　前期节奏比较慢，中后期节奏加快，不喜勿入！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/da970dfe4f962d17062ed7fae2d10882","author":"白凰的屠冥","author_id":"","book_id":"7430558119207373849","book_name":"捡个仙鼎当靠山，我从凡人苟成仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7432277299891798553","read_count":"19752","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1435573"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"642","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,架空,东方玄幻,空间","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8b0d68bb1a02908f0d9a337ef5e8d88e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383630&x-signature=zZHleE9PQ%2Fpymqw%2B3sbqH8%2FZP4A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3192586916864264","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"137"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032301135015E1CE2F5AE26E54E241"}"},"relate_inf
